name: cut-the-curve
title: Cut the Curve
description: A velocity-matched directional hard cut: the outgoing subject accelerates with power4.in, swaps at peak velocity, and the incoming subject continues in the same direction with power4.out.
evidence: launches-cut-the-curve.md; production motion census establishes the power4.in to power4.out whip, matched direction, seam blur, and canonical 1:2 split

variables.label: Subject
variables.description: Visual payload used on both sides of the cut.

variables.label: Direction
variables.description: Shared screen direction for outgoing and incoming travel.

variables.label: Cut fraction
variables.description: Normalized point where the hard cut swaps subjects.

variables.label: Cut blur
variables.description: Blur in pixels shared by both subjects at the cut seam.
